summary.interpretationNotLoaded: Natal chart interpretation data not loaded.
summary.summaryNotFormed: Complete personality summary not yet formed.
summary.dataAvailableInOtherTabs: Data is available in other tabs: Overview, Planets, Houses, Aspects.
summary.summaryGuideText: The cards below show the essence. Tap any card to open the full interpretation without overloading the screen.
summary.keyHouseRulersHint: This shows which real-life areas carry the chart's main axes.
summary.strongestAspectsHint: These are the most influential links in the chart and the ones that color the life story most strongly.
summary.uniqueFeatures: What stands out in this chart
summary.uniqueFeaturesHint: These are the most distinctive astrological features of this particular chart.
summary.dominantElementsHint: These elements show which energy in the chart comes through most naturally and repeatedly.
summary.dominantQualitiesHint: These qualities show how the chart initiates, sustains, and changes processes.

fire.overview: Fire gives the chart direct, initiating, fast-rising energy. You tend to move more easily through action than through long hesitation.
fire.strength: Core strength: courage, drive, and the ability to ignite movement quickly.
fire.watchOut: Watch for impulsiveness, impatience, and burnout when everything is lived at maximum intensity.

earth.overview: Earth makes the chart practical, steady, and result-oriented. Energy feels most natural when it becomes something tangible.
earth.strength: Core strength: reliability, discipline, and the ability to turn effort into form and usefulness.
earth.watchOut: Watch for rigidity, over-caution, and getting stuck in control or routine.

air.overview: Air strengthens thinking, connection, and the need to understand life through ideas, dialogue, and perspective.
air.strength: Core strength: mental flexibility, communication, and seeing multiple options at once.
air.watchOut: Watch for scattering attention, overthinking, and staying in the mind instead of acting.

water.overview: Water makes the chart sensitive, deep, and intuitive. You tend to read atmosphere, emotion, and unspoken motives more strongly.
water.strength: Core strength: empathy, emotional depth, and subtle awareness of people and timing.
water.watchOut: Watch for mood swings, absorbing other people's emotional weather, and getting pulled too deeply into feelings.

cardinal.overview: Cardinal quality makes you a starter. The chart finds it easier to enter a new cycle than to remain in an old one.
cardinal.strength: Core strength: initiative, quick starts, and the power to get things moving.
cardinal.watchOut: Watch for impatience with slower processes and difficulty sustaining the long middle after the launch.

fixed.overview: Fixed quality brings steadiness, loyalty to a course, and the ability to hold shape under pressure.
fixed.strength: Core strength: consistency, endurance, and the ability to stabilize results.
fixed.watchOut: Watch for stubbornness, inertia, and resistance when life already needs an update.

mutable.overview: Mutable quality makes the chart flexible, adaptive, and responsive to changing context.
mutable.strength: Core strength: adaptability, learning speed, and the ability to connect different approaches.
mutable.watchOut: Watch for diffuseness, indecision, and losing focus when there are too many possible directions.
